text.title: Accessibility Basics Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Accessibility Basics end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: scope-and-pin
step.action: Pin WCAG version+level (default 2.2 AA); identify scope (one URL or one PR).

step.name: run-axe
step.action: Run axe DevTools or `axe-core` against the target; capture findings with SC + POUR tags.

step.name: five-minute-manual
step.action: Execute the 5-step quick-check: tab through, 200% zoom, alt-text, label, axe.

step.name: merge-and-tag
step.action: Merge findings; tag each with POUR principle + WCAG SC + severity; add explicit '30% coverage' caveat.
step.decision-gate: If only scanner findings remain, STOP and run manual.

step.name: publish
step.action: Validate with `scripts/validate-a11y-basics.py`; attach to PR or audit log.
